title: Settings
subtitle: Manage API access, interface preferences, default folders, and assistant behavior.
computerUseHint: GUI-managed computer use defaults to an isolated browser-cdp primitive path for agent browser work. Native host input is optional/internal and should be used only for trusted manual tests.
computerUseEnableDesc: Expose the GUI-managed computer-use MCP server backed by @sciforge/computer-use. The default backend is isolated browser-cdp.
computerUseRuntimeAccessDesc: Choose which runtimes receive the GUI-managed isolated browser-cdp computer-use path.
computerUseBackendDesc: Shows the configured primitive backend, latest runtime diagnostic, and reported safety properties.
computerUseDisabledHint: Computer use is disabled in settings. Existing runtime sessions may need to restart before this takes effect.
computerUsePermissionsDesc: Accessibility and Screen Recording apply to optional native host-input backends. The default isolated browser-cdp path does not drive the active desktop.
computerUseRestartHint: macOS has granted Accessibility to the app, but the current process has not picked it up yet. Restart SciForge before using computer use.
computerUseActiveLeasesDesc: Currently held computer-use targets reported by active MCP server processes.
computerUseRecentRejectionsDesc: Most recent lease/action denials reported by the backend.
agentRuntimeDesc: Choose which local runtime the app should use. This settings page only saves the selected runtime and its configuration.
modelRouterDesc: Configure the local routing layer used by agent runtimes and writing features.
modelRouterHealthStatic: Live health checks are not connected in this settings view yet; saved values are used when the app starts local runtimes.
modelRouterHealthMissing: Base URL, runtime API key, and public model alias are required before local runtimes can use the router.
modelRouterBaseUrlDesc: Local OpenAI-compatible endpoint exposed to app-managed runtimes.
modelRouterAutoStartDesc: Start the local router when an app-managed runtime needs it.
modelRouterRuntimeApiKeyDesc: Auto-generated local credential used between the app, local runtimes, and the router. This is not an upstream provider API key.
modelRouterPublicModelAliasDesc: Stable model name exposed by the local router to app-managed runtimes.
modelRouterConfigFileDesc: Edit provider members, routing rules, and upstream credentials in the local config file.
modelRouterOpenConfigFileError: Could not open Model Router config file: {{message}}
modelRouterOpenConfigFileUnavailable: Model Router config file opener is unavailable.
codexRuntimeDesc: Configure the Codex app-server stdio runtime. Changes are saved to settings and take effect when the runtime is started by the app-server path.
codexCommandDesc: Executable or command used to launch Codex app-server.
codexHomeDesc: Directory used for Codex app-server state and configuration.
codexExtraArgsDesc: Additional command-line arguments, one per line.
claudeRuntimeDesc: Configure the installed Claude Code CLI runtime. Model requests are forced through the local Model Router.
claudeCommandDesc: Executable or command used to launch Claude Code.
claudeModelDesc: Saved for display; runtime launches Claude with the Model Router public alias.
claudeApprovalPolicyDesc: Mapped to Claude CLI permission mode; GUI per-tool approvals are not intercepted in v1.
claudeSandboxModeDesc: Mapped to Claude CLI permission mode. Full access is only used when explicitly selected.
claudeExtraArgsDesc: Additional Claude Code arguments, one per line. Router, model, cwd, and output flags are managed by the app.
connectPhoneEnabledDesc: When enabled, phone connections, remote-channel relays, and the local IM webhook can run in the background. Turning it off does not affect normal GUI chats.
connectPhoneDefaultWorkspaceDesc: Leave this empty to use the GUI default working directory. Individual phone connections can still override it.
connectPhoneManageAgentsEmpty: No phone agent has been connected yet. Use Connect phone to add a remote channel first.
connectPhoneDiscordLocalOnlineGuard: Guards this channel only while this computer is online.
connectPhoneDiscordGuardConflictTitle: This Bot is being guarded by another device
connectPhoneDiscordGuardConflictDesc: Owner installation: {{owner}}. Manual takeover is available as a placeholder until cross-device coordination is fully automated.
connectPhoneManageAgentNamePlaceholder: Name shown in the IM sidebar
connectPhoneManageAgentDescriptionPlaceh: Example: Handles project questions in the team chat
connectPhoneManageAgentIdentityPlacehold: Define who this agent is, its role, scope, and boundaries.
connectPhoneManageAgentPersonalityPlaceh: Define tone, style, patience, and when it should ask follow-up questions.
connectPhoneManageAgentUserContextPlaceh: Long-lived user, team, or workflow context this phone agent should remember.
connectPhoneManageAgentReplyRulesPlaceho: Define reply format, length, risk checks, or confirmation rules.
clawSkillAllowlistDesc: One skill name per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks use these skill hints first.
clawExtraSkillDirsDesc: Optional local skill folders to make available to the AI assistant.
clawPromptPrefixDesc: Added before phone messages and scheduled task prompts.
clawPromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: You are my personal automation assistant. Identify the source before answering.
codePromptPrefixDesc: These instructions are injected before every Code mode conversation. Use for global rules, coding conventions, or persistent preferences.
codePromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: Always write unit tests for new code. Prefer functional components over class components. Use TypeScript strict mode conventions.
clawRunModeDesc: Default handling mode for phone messages and scheduled tasks.
connectPhoneAgentModelDesc: Choose automatic, Pro, or Flash model routing.
connectPhoneWorkspaceOverrideDesc: Leave empty to use the default working directory.
clawTasksDesc: Each task sends its prompt to the AI assistant on the configured schedule.
clawTaskPromptPlaceholder: Example: Summarize recent workspace changes and list follow-ups.
speechToTextEnabledDesc: Show voice input controls once a Model Router speech model is configured.
speechToTextModelDesc: Model ID sent through the local Model Router ASR request.
speechToTextLanguageDesc: Optional language hint. Auto-detect leaves the provider to decide.
speechToTextTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for one transcription request, in milliseconds.
themeDesc: Light, dark, or match the operating system.
onboardingPreviewDesc: Reopen the basic setup flow shown on first launch.
fontScaleDesc: Adjust the overall UI text size.
turnCompleteNotificationDesc: Show a native Windows/macOS notification when the AI assistant finishes replying.
desktopOpenAtLoginDesc: Start SciForge automatically after you sign in.
desktopOpenAtLoginUnsupportedDesc: Open at login is available on Windows and macOS.
desktopStartMinimizedDesc: Keep the main window hidden during Windows login startup.
desktopStartMinimizedDisabledDesc: Enable Open at login first. This option applies to Windows startup.
desktopCloseToTrayDesc: Hide the window to the system tray when it is closed.
shortcutCaptureHint: Press the new shortcut. Press Esc to cancel.
shortcutTogglePlanModeDesc: Switch the composer between Agent and Plan mode.
shortcutNewChatDesc: Start a new chat in the current workspace.
shortcutToggleTerminalDesc: Open or close the terminal panel.
shortcutSelectAllDesc: Select content in the focused view.
shortcutToggleMaximizeDesc: Maximize or restore the main window.
localRuntimeProviderDesc: Configure provider members for the local Model Router. Each member can keep its own API key, endpoint URL, and model list.
modelProviderModels: Models, one model ID per line
localRuntimeServiceAdvancedDesc: Model, runtime-only API, local port, and data path settings for advanced users.
localRuntimeDiagnosticsAdvancedDesc: Runtime abilities, tool connections, and memory records.
localRuntimeCapabilitiesDesc: Check whether the local runtime service currently has web, skills, attachments, and memory available.
localRuntimeToolDiagnosticsDesc: Check connected tool sources, external tool services, skills, attachments, and memory.
modelAuditRecordsDesc: Inspect recent runtime model request summaries captured through the shared runtime contract. Records stay in memory only.
modelAuditEmpty: No model request audit records have been captured in this process.
gitCheckpointsDesc: Preview and restore Git checkpoints captured around runtime turns. Restore is blocked when the working tree changed unless force restore is enabled.
gitCheckpointEmpty: No Git checkpoints are visible for this workspace.
gitCheckpointPreviewEmpty: This checkpoint has no patch preview.
localRuntimeMemoryRecordsDesc: Review memories available to this workspace, then disable or delete anything you do not want reused.
localRuntimeMemoryEmpty: No memory records are visible for this workspace.
localRuntimeBinaryDesc: Usually leave this empty so the app uses the bundled Local Runtime service. Set a path only for local development or debugging.
localRuntimeDataDirDesc: Stores sessions, cache data, and the configuration synced from the app to the Local Runtime service.
localRuntimeModelDesc: Default model ID used by the Local Runtime when a request does not choose one.
localRuntimeTokenEconomyDesc: Reduce model context use by compacting safe tool descriptions and tool results without changing stored chat history.
localRuntimeTokenEconomySavingsEmpty: Savings will start accumulating after the next request.
localRuntimeTokenEconomyAdvancedDesc: Control exactly what gets compacted, long-history guards, and the local access token.
localRuntimeTokenEconomyOptionsDesc: When context reduction is on, choose which request content is compacted before it reaches the model.
localRuntimeHistoryHygieneDesc: Before each model request, cap long tool results and tool arguments. Original chat history is kept unchanged.
localRuntimeInsecure: Allow local access without a token
localRuntimeInsecureDesc: For local development only. Other local programs can connect to the Local Runtime service without an access token.
localRuntimeInsecureForcedDesc: Local access protection is off because no access token is set. Add a token to control this switch again.
localRuntimeAdvancedDetails: Storage, model context, and tool guards
localRuntimeAdvancedDetailsDesc: These options affect how the Local Runtime runs internally. Per-model context policy comes from models.profiles; this page mainly adjusts fallback behavior.
localRuntimeStorageBackendDesc: Hybrid storage uses SQLite to speed up indexes. Pure JSONL does not use SQLite and is simpler for compatibility debugging.
localRuntimeStorageSqlitePathDesc: Optional. Leave empty to create the index under the Local Runtime data folder. Used only with hybrid storage.
localRuntimeModelContextProfileDesc: Model windows and per-model compaction thresholds come from models.profiles in local config.json. DeepSeek V4 defaults to a 1M context window and starts compaction around 980k.
localRuntimeModelContextSourceFallback: No matched model profile; using fallback thresholds below
localRuntimeCompactionThresholdsDesc: These values are used only when the current model does not match models.profiles. Known models such as DeepSeek V4 use their model profile thresholds.
localRuntimeCompactionSummaryDesc: Local summaries are fast and free. Model summaries read more naturally but use an extra model request.
runtimeGuardToolStormDesc: Detect repeated tool activity across runtimes and steer or interrupt the turn according to each runtime capability.
runtimeGuardToolStormLimitsDesc: Soft limits steer the runtime to answer with existing results; hard limits interrupt repeated activity.
localRuntimeToolArgumentRepairDesc: Single string arguments longer than this byte count are truncated before tool execution, avoiding unusually large arguments.
portDesc: Port used by the Local Runtime service. Most users do not need to change it.
runtimeTokenDesc: Protects the Local Runtime service running on this computer. Fill this only if another local program needs to connect to it.
configFilePathDesc: Path to the MCP external tool server JSON config.
skillsLocationDesc: Choose the folder Plugins > Skills reads from and saves to by default.
skillsPathDesc: This page only manages folder locations. Use Plugins > Skills to create or edit skills.
skillsScanDirsDesc: One local path per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks can also use skills from these folders.
skillsActionsDesc: Create, install, and edit skills from Plugins > Skills. Settings keeps only folder-level options.
skillsRootUnavailable: This folder is unavailable. Choose a workspace-backed option or switch to a global skills folder.
mcpSearchEnabledDesc: When many external tools are connected, give the model only the most relevant tools to reduce pauses and context use.
mcpAdvancedDesc: Selection mode, candidate counts, connection config file, and save actions.
mcpSearchModeDesc: Auto filters when many tools are connected; Always filter searches for relevant tools every time; Direct gives every tool to the model.
mcpSearchLimitsDesc: Control how many tools trigger filtering and how many candidate tools are offered each time.
mcpSearchAutoThreshold: Start filtering after this many tools
mcpSearchDiagnosticsDesc: See whether external tool filtering is active and how many tools are available.
mcpPathDesc: Location of the external tool connection config file.
mcpEditorDesc: Edit MCP external tool server connections here. Model and provider credentials do not live in this file; they are managed by Basics and Model Router provider member settings.
mcpFileStatusReady: The current content was loaded from the config file.
mcpFileStatusMissing: The config file does not exist yet. It will be created on first save.
mcpRuntimeHint: If saved changes do not take effect, restart the Local Runtime service or reopen the app.
remoteExecutorEnabledDesc: Show configured SSH and Slurm targets in the thread target selector.
remoteExecutorDefaultTargetDesc: Used as the starting target for new turns when the selector has not been changed.
remoteExecutorNoTargets: No remote targets are configured yet.
remoteTargetWorkspaceTrustDesc: Allow this target to run trusted workspace turns for {{workspace}}.
remoteTargetWorkspaceTrustNoWorkspace: Choose a default working directory before trusting a workspace.
apiKeyDesc: Required for the provider member that the local Model Router uses by default.
apiKeySharedDesc: Required for the provider member that the local Model Router uses by default.
baseUrlDesc: Default provider member URL. Leave empty to use the local Model Router default.
baseUrlSharedDesc: Default provider member URL. Leave empty to use the local Model Router default.
imageGenerationEnabledDesc: Temporary worker-contained Image Generation MCP exception. It stays disabled until these settings are configured; other model traffic still goes through Model Router.
imageGenerationApiKeyDesc: Only passed to Image Generation MCP. It does not overwrite the General provider key or Model Router runtime key.
imageGenerationBaseUrlDesc: Image Generation MCP endpoint URL. Leave empty to keep image rendering disabled until configured.
imageGenerationModelDesc: Model ID used for text-to-image generation and Canvas edits.
firstRunTitle: Set up the essentials before you start chatting.
firstRunSubtitle: Choose your language and add the provider member credentials the local Model Router should use.
firstRunChangeLater: You can change these values anytime from Settings after the workbench opens.
firstRunPreviewHint: This reuses the first-launch flow; unsaved theme previews are restored when you close it.
firstRunBuyApiHint: Use a key from the provider member you want the local Model Router to call. You can update provider member settings later.
firstRunApiKeyValidation: Please enter a provider member API key before continuing.
autoStartDesc: Recommended. The app starts the Local Runtime service automatically when chats, writing, or phone connections need it.
corsOriginsDesc: Additional allowed Origin values for the local HTTP server.
approvalPolicyDesc: Controls whether the Local Runtime must ask before editing files, running commands, or using other tools. Changes apply after the service restarts or reconnects.
approvalSuggest: Suggest only; do not change files
sandboxModeDesc: Limit which local files the Local Runtime can read or change. Changes apply after the service restarts or reconnects.
autoApplyBlocked: Fix the port to apply changes
workspaceRootDesc: First launch uses ~/.sciforge/default_workspace by default, and you can change it to another directory.
writeInlineCompletionEnabledDesc: Show gray continuation suggestions in the Markdown editor that you can accept with Tab.
writeInlineCompletionRetrievalDesc: Before generating a suggestion, quickly reference Markdown files in the writing workspace so terminology, facts, and style stay consistent.
writeInlineCompletionDebounceDesc: How long the editor waits after typing stops before showing a suggestion. Shorter is more responsive; longer is quieter and saves requests.
writeInlineCompletionThresholdDesc: Controls how often suggestions appear. Stricter settings show fewer, steadier suggestions.
writeInlineCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Higher numbers allow longer suggestions. Keep this short so suggestions feel like the next few lines, not a full draft.
writeInlineLongCompletionDesc: When the cursor rests longer at a line end or paragraph boundary, show a fuller next sentence or paragraph idea.
writeInlineLongCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Controls the maximum length for paragraph inspiration suggestions, best for about one paragraph of continuation.
writeInlineCompletionApiNote: These settings only affect automatic suggestions in Writing mode. Empty values inherit the Basics provider member key, provider member URL, and assistant model. Press Tab to accept and Esc to hide.
writeDebugLogDesc: View recent writing suggestion requests and responses to understand why suggestions did not appear or felt off.
writeDebugLogModalDesc: Inspect the context sent for writing suggestions, raw model responses, and parsed output.
writeInlineEditDebugDesc: Inspect recent writing edit calls, including what was sent to the model, the raw response, and the parsed action, so it is easier to tell whether a problem came from the request, model output, or app handling.
writeInlineEditDebugEmpty: No text edit calls yet. Run AI Edit on a selection and the calls will appear here.
writeCompletionDebugEmpty: No writing suggestion calls yet. Trigger a writing suggestion and the calls will appear here.
writeApiKeyDesc: Writing completion and the writing assistant inherit the General provider member key unless a Write override is set.
apiKeyRequiredBody: Add a provider member API key in Basics first. Once entered, the app can start the local Model Router and Local Runtime service for you.
guiUpdateChannelDesc: Stable is the default; Frontier is only used after you switch to it. Stable only receives formal stable releases.
guiUpdateDesc: Check the selected release channel for GUI updates, then download and install in the app.
guiUpdateCheckFailed: Could not check for GUI updates
guiUpdateErrNotConfigured: Update checking isn't available right now.
guiUpdateErrUnsupported: This build does not support in-app automatic updates. Open the download page to install manually.
guiUpdateErrRepoNotFound: The update source «{{repo}}» wasn't found or isn't reachable on GitHub.
guiUpdateErrForbidden: Couldn't fetch update information. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrNoStableVersion: No stable release or tag to compare yet (for example v0.1.0). Repo: {{repo}}.
guiUpdateAvailableManual: New version available: {{current}} → {{latest}}. Install it from the download page.
guiUpdateDownloadedDesc: Restart the app to install the new version.
logDirDesc: App error logs and Local Runtime service output are written to daily files in this folder.
logEnabledDesc: Write tool call errors, request failures, app errors, and Local Runtime service output to log files. Logs are cleaned up automatically.
logRetentionDesc: Delete log files older than the selected number of days.
preloadBridgeError: The app bridge is not available. Restart the application or check the preload path.
